source: Band of Blades (authored from setting — no stat block PDF source)
note: BoB adversaries use threat_level and campaign_phase instead of D&D AC/HP. Threat levels map to mission difficulty 1-4.

1.name: Broken Infantry
1.description: Reanimated soldiers from a dozen different armies, marching in lockstep.

1.name: Hollow Scout
1.description: A fast, dead thing that reports back to something worse.
1.weakness: isolation, bright light, sharp hearing countered by silence

1.name: Cult Initiate
1.description: A living deserter who chose the wrong side. Desperate, not skilled.

1.name: Plague Beast
1.description: An animal bloated with necrotic energy, teeth still sharp.

1.name: Undead Militia
1.description: Civilians raised from a village the Legion couldn't reach in time.
1.weakness: chokepoints, ranged fire, morale-immune means nothing to the living allies

2.name: Chosen Champion
2.description: A former hero turned by the Cinder King. Remembers its name. Hates you for it.
2.weakness: reminders of its past life, the Chosen bond

2.name: Undead Heavy Infantry
2.description: Armored dead in full plate. They were elite once.

2.name: Infamous Infiltrator
2.description: A traitor embedded in the Legion. Knows routes, rosters, supply lines.

2.name: Cursed Cavalry
2.description: Riders and mounts fused together in death. Fast and relentless.

2.name: Plague Engine
2.description: A siege weapon repurposed as a plague-spreader. It moves on its own.

3.name: Named Undead Marshal
3.description: A general of the Cinder King's armies. Has tactical intelligence and a grudge.
3.weakness: its surviving mortal family, the original wound that killed it

3.name: Undead Siege Tower
3.description: Crawling with dead soldiers and imbued with dark magic. It doesn't stop.
3.weakness: structural collapse, blessed siege weapons, sabotage at the foundation

3.name: Devoted Chosen
3.description: A Chosen who answered the Cinder King's call willingly. Powerful and ideologically committed.
3.weakness: the Chosen bond inverted, other Chosen allies

3.name: Mass Plague Wave
3.description: Not a creature — a tide. Hundreds of infected dead rushing a position.
3.weakness: choke point defense, fire barriers, artillery

4.name: Cinder King Avatar
4.description: Not the Cinder King himself — a manifestation of his will given form. The campaign ends if this is not stopped.
4.weakness: the Black Oak Seal, the six Chosen bonds united, sacred ground

4.name: Undead Leviathan
4.description: A sea creature of immense size, reanimated as a weapon of war. Used to destroy coastal fortifications.
4.weakness: specialized siege weapons, Chosen with water-domain powers
